name: Out of Scale: A Kurzgesagt Adventure

reviews.review_description: This game is too short and not worth the $20 price tag.  My son completed it within the first couple hours of playing it.
This is a cute little game that teaches you some basics about biology.
Game was a little to short

reviews.review_title: Oh my God Play this game￼
reviews.review_description: The game is a little bit glitchy but it’s fun and it teaches kids like me a lot and the quests are very fun. Honestly if you gave this to your child they would probably not know it was a game that taught you stuff and they would enjoy it a lot
The game is good but it should have a bit more content or some sort of endless content thing
Must for fans of the channel. Educational and easy going play. Great art style and voiceover!

A great experience that I really enjoyed playing. You switch between scales/realms (kilometers, meters, insects, bacteria, molecular level), scan things, collect things, shrink or enlarge them, combine a bit, and then bring everything back 'into order'. It's an easy game, not challenging, but more about having fun, learning, and enjoying. However, I wish there were at least a few really challenging puzzle elements. As it is, it's fun, but due to its simplicity, very short - it took me less than 2 hours to complete 100% and achieve all achievements.

Two wishes at the end: I miss a German translation - it is unfortunately only in English, and I would like more adventures/missions.

I got stuck multiple times, at the ants, at the protein (why do i need to scan the thing i just scanned again to pick it up and why does nobody tell me this). For such a linear experience, its very frustrating to get stuck. The resolution on quest 3 seems to be low aswell. Its well made but getting a little bit of information about a thing then getting a tiny bit of information about another thing in the span of an hour is a bit meh. I think there was so much potential in vr but its kinda wasted by creating an ordinary experience that a video couldve portrayed better.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback. We just released a hot fix to make the pheromone part of the ant mission clearer. Please note that you have to restart the ant mission by using the ant capsule from the title screen to see this update.

reviews.review_description:
I played it for a few minutes but all I got was these tedious tutorials that slowly drag you through doing a singular task. 

You’re forced to stand in place while nothing happens and a voice drones on about completely mundane and obvious aspects of the UI. 

All of this happens whilst you’re forced into a virtual experience with zero mixed reality happening. 

This pattern of forcing the player to stand still while nothing happens should be avoided in all vr. 

As far as I’m concerned, this game is essentially sleep paralysis forcing the player to await some glimpse of some less constrictive experience that is never delivered. One star.
Fun, educational, entertaining for people of all ages. It’s a good tool to try if people that don’t care about the scientific method a fun way to try to get into interested in it.
I’m a big fan of kurzgesagt and it’s been so much fun playing a game of kurzgesagt let alone a VR one!
But I loved it!
It’s kinda hard for me to do and how is it multiplayer if you don’t see anyone also, I need a walk-through🔻🔻🔻🔻🔻🔻🔻 shrink down

developer_response.body: Hey Meanmuggin10, great to hear you are enjoying the kurzgesagt experience! We did compile a walk-through for anyone stuck: check out https://kgs.link/OOS-Walkthrough - hope that helps you continue your playthrough! (PS: multiplayer refers to the theater where you can watch some of our videos together with your friends on Quest.)

reviews.review_title: The game is buggy to say the least
reviews.review_description: I got to the part where on the walkthrough website it says to scan the vase I tried everything but alas it didn't work the walkthrough is basically useless. The game needs to be fixed

developer_response.body: Hi Lazertryhard_YT, we just rolled out a hotfix - is your issue resolved now? Alternatively it would be great if you could specify where you still feel stuck, then we can look further into the issue.

reviews.review_description: Honestly, I kinda like it, the most the games I have played 10/10

The game is good. Cool puzzles, lots of new + interesting information, good gameplay, ect. Polishing is needed, but I haven’t run into any bugs as of yet. Would recommend if you’re looking to buy the game.

reviews.review_title: Haven’t even played the game yet
reviews.review_description: This game just looks so visually stunning that I already know my play through is going to be half of just admiring the different levels and abilities, and I think it’s cool I got top five comments.

reviews.review_title: Very good , just one tiny problem
reviews.review_description: Game is too short , add at least 1 more chapter
I have allways loved kurzgesagt and lord VR so this is cool
I love this game its a beautiful game wirh Lots of Kreativität and its fun
